mapper.insert:
insert into t_bas_approval_flow
flow_id, ent_code, flow_name, business_type, start_node_id, version, active, default_flow, description,
#{flowId}, #{entCode}, #{flowName}, #{businessType}, #{startNodeId}, #{version}, #{active}, #{defaultFlow}, #{description},
mapper.delete:
delete from t_bas_approval_node where flow_id in
#{flowId}
mapper.select: select start_node_id from t_bas_approval_flow where flow_id = #{flowId}

select n.node_id, n.flow_id, f.flow_name, n.node_name, n.assignee_user, u.user_name as assignee_user_name, n.next_node_id, n.timeout_hours, n.update_time from t_bas_approval_node n left join t_bas_approval_flow f on f.flow_id = n.flow_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = n.assignee_user where n.flow_id = #{flowId}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_bas_approval_node (node_id, flow_id, node_name, assignee_user, next_node_id, timeout_hours) values
(#{item.nodeId}, #{item.flowId}, #{item.nodeName}, #{item.assigneeUser}, #{item.nextNodeId}, #{item.timeoutHours})
mapper.select: select n.node_id, n.flow_id, f.flow_name, n.node_name, n.assignee_user, u.user_name as assignee_user_name, n.next_node_id, n.timeout_hours, n.update_time from t_bas_approval_node n inner join t_bas_approval_flow f on f.flow_id = #{flowId} and f.start_node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = n.assignee_user
